Title: Filter account workspace

As a account manager
I want search and filters within account sections
So that I can narrow long account records quickly

Acceptance Criteria:
- [ ] Filterbar appears only in account detail view.
- [ ] Search text is passed into AccountView sections.
- [ ] Reset confirmation clears search, action status, date, executive, incomplete, and owner filters.

Notes: Filter reset and propagation were corrected after initial implementation.
